one_time_description: Settlement claim received in prior year (2020) of $21,428,571
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership (99%) and PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation (100%), established for development and management of own source revenue contracts and economic development opportunities. Subsequent event: severe flooding in BC after year-end.
notes: Audit is qualified due to absence of budget comparatives. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Large settlement claim of $21,428,571 was received in prior year (2020), causing a dramatic drop in revenue and a large deficit in 2021. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership and PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation. Administration expenses of $10.5M are unusually high relative to revenue, largely driven by operating expenses of $10.1M in that segment. Funds held in Ottawa Trust Fund ($869,068) included in financial assets. ISC management review letter from prior year under appeal with uncertain outcome. Audit report dated December 9, 2022, significantly late relative to July 2021 FNFTA deadline. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($895,670) + Other government per segment schedule ($886,878) = $1,782,548.
